## Summary
<!-- One-sentence description of the feature -->

## Problem / motivation
<!-- What problem does this solve? What use case does it enable? -->

## Proposed solution
<!-- Describe how you envision this working -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- What other approaches have you thought about? -->

## Additional context
<!-- Screenshots, references, related issues -->

## Scope estimate
- [ ] Small — single file change or UI tweak
- [ ] Medium — new dialog or engine method
- [ ] Large — new mode page or multi-component feature
- [ ] Roadmap — suggest for v1.1+ (Cloud Sync / macOS / mobile)
